markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Directors sync to discuss changes to client onboarding, content production processes, and team structure.](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shifting from "pilot period" to "strategy sprint" for new clients to set better expectations and deliver more upfront value](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Centralizing content production and creating specialized roles (e.g. researchers, publishers) to improve quality and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Implementing stricter quality control measures, including director review of calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Moving away from freelancers to full-time employees for security/compliance reasons](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
  - [Forming a "SWAT team" of top performers to handle strategy sprints and challenging accounts](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

## Topics

### New Client Onboarding Process

  - [Replacing 3-month "pilot period" with 6-8 week "strategy sprint"](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Goal is to deliver high value upfront and set clear expectations](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Will involve dedicated SWAT team to ensure quality](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Allows mutual opt-out if not a good fit](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [Focuses on editorial/publishing services initially, less on programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

### Content Production Changes

  - [Centralizing production vs. delivery roles](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Creating specialized positions like researchers and publishers](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Implementing stricter quality control, including director review of calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Moving away from freelancers to full-time employees](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
  - [Aiming for 80%+ of content to be "publish-ready" before client review](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)

### Team Structure and Roles

  - [Forming SWAT team of top performers for strategy sprints and challenging accounts](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Directors should be primary client-facing contacts, especially for new accounts](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [More specialized roles like dedicated publishers to be added](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Shifting away from having CMs/MEs interact directly with clients until ready](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)

### Platform/Technology Updates

  - [Moving off Airtable/Airops to custom platform by June 16th](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [New platform will enable better workflows, quality control, and programmatic SEO capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [Engineering team making rapid progress on new features](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)

### Programmatic SEO Challenges

  - [Currently limited capacity for programmatic/technical SEO work](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [Need to review existing programmatic client commitments](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [May need to reset expectations or shift focus for some accounts](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [New platform will improve programmatic capabilities in \~4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Select members for SWAT team and backfill their current roles](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Schedule working session to review programmatic SEO accounts and develop action plans](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Develop plans to add design/development capacity and publishing resources](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Directors to identify top performers and assess team members more critically](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=4661.0)
  - [Implement new quality control measures, including director review of calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up session on team structure changes and specialized roles](https://fathom.video/share/GxtEg_MV_h1oiSrsBRoVZU7tKgr6a5mU?tab=summary&timestamp=5849.0)
